html:
2026-0371
2026-04-21SB&TCanadian Tourism Commission ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Tourism CommissionApproval of the re-appointment by the Secretary of State (Small Business and Tourism) of Benjamin Ryan of Whitehorse, Yukon, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Tourism Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Tourism Commission
precis: Approval of the re-appointment by the Secretary of State (Small Business and Tourism) of Benjamin Ryan of Whitehorse, Yukon, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Tourism Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 23, 2026.
